name: Wingman/Stasis
description: A self-contained, framework-agnostic caching engine with a swappable adapter model (Local filesystem, APCu, Redis, Memcached), configurable key sharding, tag-based invalidation, PSR-16-compatible method signatures, atomic increment/decrement counters, and a built-in repair command. Integrates transparently with the Wingman framework via Cortex configuration hydration and Synapse DI, but operates fully standalone with sensible defaults and zero mandatory external dependencies.
